settings.title: Morning control.
settings.text: Coffee, focus, intentions set. You've got this.

settings.title: The signal.
settings.text: Blood sugar dips. Your body asks for sugar. It's biological — not character.

settings.title: Willpower gone.
settings.text: You over-eat dinner to make up for what the afternoon took. Guilt loops back.

settings.title: "My 4pm crash is gone."
settings.body: I used to raid the snack drawer at 3:30 every single afternoon. Three weeks in, I genuinely forget. The taste is also way better than I expected.*
settings.name: Ashley K.

settings.title: "Finally something that holds."
settings.body: I tried so many "satiety" drinks. Most lasted 45 minutes max. This one actually carries me from 3pm to dinner. No coffee crash either.*
settings.name: Jessica M.

settings.title: "My evenings changed."
settings.body: I stopped over-eating dinner. The afternoons feel calm. I'm not white-knuckling it anymore. Recommending to my sister.*
settings.name: Megan R.

settings.question: How does UBurn actually work?
settings.answer: Glucomannan, a soluble konjac fiber, forms a natural gel when it meets water in your stomach. EFSA recognizes this mechanism for satiety support within an energy-controlled diet. Result: you feel satisfied for up to 4 hours after one scoop.*

settings.question: When will I notice a difference?
settings.answer: Most customers report satiety from the first scoop. For consistent control over afternoon cravings, 7-14 days of daily use produces the most reliable signal.*

settings.question: Does it contain caffeine?
settings.answer: Zero caffeine. UBurn is built on plant fibers and natural actives — no jitters, no afternoon crash, drinkable any time of day.

settings.question: How does it taste?
settings.answer: Hazelnut-vanilla notes. Smooth, naturally violet color from purple ube root. Mix with cold water, oat milk, or hot frothed milk depending on your moment.

settings.question: Is it a meal replacement?
settings.answer: No. UBurn is a dietary supplement designed to support satiety alongside balanced meals — it does not replace meals. 30 kcal per scoop.

settings.question: When does it ship to the US?
settings.answer: We ship from France within 24-48h after order. US delivery typically 5-8 business days. Free shipping on orders $40+.

settings.question: Subscribe or one-time purchase?
settings.answer: Both. Subscribe & save gives -10% and free violet bottle. You can pause, skip or cancel anytime from your account. No lock-in.

settings.hero_sub: Plant-based satiety drink crafted in France. 30 calories. 4 hours of calm. Zero caffeine.
settings.founder_quote: I built UBurn because I needed it. Not a powder that promises miracles — a drink that actually holds you through the 4pm crash. Made with the same care I'd expect for myself.
settings.final_sub: One scoop. One glass. Four hours of calm. Crafted in France, made for the US.
